title: Bump containers/image to v5.10.5 in the v3.0.1-rhel branch
body:
As the title says.

No c/storage bump Podman is already at v1.24.8.  
Also, Buildah is at c/storage v1.24.8 and c/image v5.10.5 so no bumps inbound for it for RHEL 8.4.

BZ: https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1938234

-->
